name: Global Sports Institute
description: At GSI, we’re all about creating a place where pickleball feels like home. With 10 indoor courts, climate-controlled and topped with Taraflex flooring, we’ve made sure every game is as fun as it is easy on your joints. Join as a member for private court bookings or unlimited open play, or drop in anytime for just $10 per person. After a game, relax in our comfy lounge, freshen up in our secure locker rooms, or soon, enjoy a coffee at our on-site café. We’re here to make pickleball your favorite part of the day!

name: SRQ Dinkers
description:
2 championship courts, 9 standard courts and 1 dinking court.  Our courts have Cushion X soft surface.  The first layer of the court is a rubber pad that is very forgiving for your back, knees, ankles and feet.  It plays like a hard court.

We have a variety of programming including open play, skilled level play, round robins, leagues, tournaments, clinics and lessons to name a few.
open_play_schedule: 8:00 AM to 10:00 PM. Use the Dill Dinkers app to set up member and non-member account.  The Dill Dinkers app is also used to see our schedule and make reservations.
